# 2026-03-01 — Sunday

Rain since 5. Stayed in.

Sofia flagged a race in the sidecar. She was right — reproduced on the third try.

Theo sent designs for the Before/After panel. They're right; my layout was overcomplicated.

Worked on the swift test pass. 0.8 is the right knob; 0.85 over-merged, 0.9 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Ran into Duarte at Lisbon. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.

Tried the new bakery on Belém. The pastel was underbaked.

A test that was hard to write is a test I trust.
